commands.repair_reason: Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is still needed before merge; there is no safe automated repair because automation cannot prove the contributor's local setup for them.; Cleared: The diff narrows the node command execution surface and does not add dependencies, workflow permissions, secrets handling, or new third-party code execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR makes pending/unapproved Nodes advertise no effective commands, blocks node command forwarding until node pairing approval, and refreshes live command/remote-skill state on approval or removal.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main returns declared commands as effective commands for unapproved first-time node pairing and forwards connected node invokes through a registry path with no pairing-store check. I did not run the Gateway scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is still needed before merge; there is no safe automated repair because automation cannot prove the contributor's local setup for them.
